author: SantiMod
content:
@here The Atlas Brew #36 - Community Updates is happening tomorrow at 19:00 UTC!

There's so much going on in the community, and we want to make sure you all know about it! Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in a Star Atlas Quiz! Winner gets a Fimbul Airbike.

The Atlas Brew is a WEEKLY Star Atlas Community Event based around having fun, speculating about the future, and much more.

Nothing discussed in The Atlas Brew is guaranteed to make it to game and the event is purely for entertainment purposes.

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1034492769965707365
